prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SSCHF6OZ-6O-STNLSSSTL-2 Product Type: HIP_FLASK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Traditional Stainless Steel Hip Flask Alcohol Concealed Drinkware, 6oz Description: Stainless steel 6 oz hip flask, perfect for traveling, hiking, backpacking, and events. Stainless steel is perfect for storing liquids as it does not affect the flavor.

The compact design makes it easy to fit into pockets, handbags,and more.

The flask also includes an attached screw cap making it impossible to lose. Search Terms: hip flask stainless steel silver trekking hiking snowboarding skiing backpacking camping gear RV camp kitchen beverage tailgating ASR Outdoor whiskey water alcohol gifts wilderness adventure groomsmen boating drinking cups campfire BBQ Features: - Material: Stainless Steel - Style: Traditional - Dimensions: 4.5" x 4" x 3/4" - Volume: 6oz - Attached Screw Cap === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6oz Stainless Steel Traditional Hip Flask

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6oz Stainless Steel Hip Flask

anthropic.title_differentiation: Compact Design, Attached Screw Cap, Hiking And Camping, Whiskey And Alcohol, Groomsmen Gifts

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel, Attached Screw Cap, Pocket Sized, Preserves Flavor, Hiking Camping Backpacking, Travel Friendly
